sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_splitpart (id INT, example_string VARCHAR(50));
SELECT splitpart(example_string, '|', 2) FROM test_splitpart WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE test_splitpart SET example_string = splitpart(example_string, '|', 4) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, splitpart(example_string, '|', 3) AS result FROM test_splitpart;
